'''thadhaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psalterion|psalterion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psalterion|psalterion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thadhaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thædhægæth|thædhægæth]] || [[word:thædhægæj|thædhægæj]] || [[word:thædhægæsh|thædhægæsh]] || [[word:thædhægæ|thædhægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhadhagath|thadhadhagath]] || [[word:thadhadhagaj|thadhadhagaj]] || [[word:thadhadhagash|thadhadhagash]] || [[word:thadhadhaga|thadhadhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhagath|thadhagath]] || [[word:thadhagaj|thadhagaj]] || [[word:thadhagash|thadhagash]] || [[word:thadhaga|thadhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhafgath|thadhafgath]] || [[word:thadhafgaj|thadhafgaj]] || [[word:thadhafgash|thadhafgash]] || [[word:thadhafgaf|thadhafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thadhagatha|thadhagatha]] || [[word:thadhagaja|thadhagaja]] || [[word:thadhagasha|thadhagasha]] || [[word:thadhagaka|thadhagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thadhagath|thadhagath]] || [[word:thadhagaj|thadhagaj]] || [[word:thadhagash|thadhagash]] || [[word:thadhaga|thadhaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thadhagathal|thadhagathal]] || [[word:thadhagajal|thadhagajal]] || [[word:thadhagashal|thadhagashal]] || [[word:thadhagakal|thadhagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thadhagathatha|thadhagathatha]] || [[word:thadhagajaja|thadhagajaja]] || [[word:thadhagashasha|thadhagashasha]] || [[word:thadhagaka|thadhagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thadhagathan|thadhagathan]] || [[word:thadhagajan|thadhagajan]] || [[word:thadhagashan|thadhagashan]] || [[word:thadhagakan|thadhagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thadhagathaoro|thadhagathaoro]] || [[word:thadhagajaoro|thadhagajaoro]] || [[word:thadhagashaoro|thadhagashaoro]] || [[word:thadhagakaoro|thadhagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
